title: Synapta Indian BFSI Benchmark v1
subtitle: 60 hand-curated extractive QA questions over RBI Master Directions and SEBI Master Circulars
description: A 60-question, hand-curated, openly licensed evaluation set for extractive question answering over Indian financial regulation - specifically Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Master Directions and Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) Master Circulars. 30 RBI / 30 SEBI, 30 numeric or short-span questions and 30 heading-bound passage questions, drawn from a document-disjoint held-out split of the Synapta RBI/SEBI corpus across 22 distinct source PDFs. Questions were produced by deterministic pattern-matching templates over headings, numeric spans and regulation references; no language model authored a question or an answer. Each record carries a difficulty tag, a topic tag, alternative-answer normalisation variants, and a fixed scoring method (substring, token-F1 thresholded at 0.5, or exact match). Ships with a reference scorer (scoring.py) reporting Wilson 95 percent confidence intervals and a paired McNemar significance test. Released under CC-BY-SA-4.0; this is v1 frozen on release. See README.md for methodology, schema, baselines, coverage limitations, and citation. GitHub: https://github.com/synapta/indian-bfsi-bench (placeholder).
